item.title: Engine Rebuild In Progress
item.description: ZX-10R has been transported to the dealership due to early signs of engine seizure. Engine Rebuild imminent.

item.title: Engine Rebuild Completed
item.description: ZX-10R Engine rebuild has been completed at Team Charlotte Motorsports and has been transported via trailer.

item.title: Engine Service: Valve Replacement in Progress
item.description: ZX-10R has been transported to the dealership for engine valve replacement. Currently waiting for head gasket since all parts have been ordered & delivered under warranty.
